Table.title: Table
Table.description: Represents a physical table or seating spot in the cafe floor plan

id.description: The unique identifier of the table

status.description: The current billing/occupancy status of the table

currentCart.description: Items ordered at this table that are yet to be checked out

x.description: The X coordinate as a percentage (0-100) of the floor plan container

y.description: The Y coordinate as a percentage (0-100) of the floor plan container

width.description: The width of the table in pixels

height.description: The height of the table in pixels

shape.description: The geometric shape representing the table

seats.description: The seating capacity of the table

FloorStructure.title: FloorStructure
FloorStructure.description: Represents a physical background structural unit like a wall, counter, door, window, plant, or text label

/tables/{tableId}.description: Collection of all physical seating tables on the interactive floor plan

/structures/{structureId}.description: Collection of all physical architectural structures on the background layout
